data.name: BusinessInvitationBodyTemplateDefault
data.value:
You are invited to Loyan

{invitation_intro_html}

Use the button below to open the invitation and continue onboarding. The invitation expires at {expires_at_utc}.

{acceptance_link_html}

Invitation token:

{token}

If you did not expect this invitation, you can ignore this email or contact support.

data.name: BusinessInvitationIntroInvitedHtml
data.value: You have been invited to join {business_name} on Darwin as {role}.

data.name: BusinessInvitationIntroReissuedHtml
data.value: Your invitation to join {business_name} on Darwin as {role} has been reissued.

data.name: AccountActivationBodyTemplateDefault
data.value:
Confirm your email address

Confirm {email} to finish setting up your Loyan account.

This secure confirmation link expires at {expires_at_utc}.

{activation_link_html}{manual_link_html}

Confirmation token:

{token}

If you did not create a Loyan account, you can ignore this email.

data.name: PasswordResetBodyTemplateDefault
data.value:
Reset your password

We received a request to reset the password for {email}.

Use the button below to choose a new password. This link expires at {expires_at_utc}.

{reset_link_html}{manual_link_html}

Reset token:

{token}

If you did not request this password reset, you can ignore this email. Your password will stay unchanged.

data.name: PhoneVerificationSmsTemplateDefault
data.value: Your Darwin verification code is {token}. It expires at {expires_at_utc} UTC.

data.name: PhoneVerificationWhatsAppTemplateDefault
data.value: Confirm your Darwin mobile number with code {token}. It expires at {expires_at_utc} UTC.

data.name: RecipientOverrideNoticeHtml
data.value: Test delivery notice: original recipient was {original_recipient}.

data.name: PhoneVerificationSmsUnavailable
data.value: SMS verification is not available right now.

data.name: PhoneVerificationWhatsAppUnavailable
data.value: WhatsApp verification is not available right now.
